entries.summary: Q-202-4 LOCK refinement needed: L2 Lean d=2 predicate JAR-submission-readiness ≠ Q-202-4 (b) PARTIAL milestone with hard-substep sorry's; JAR-submission-ready = (b) PARTIAL with zero sorry beyond named axiom
entries.evidence: Item 18 (JAR SIARC PDE Lean4) rejected 2026-04-27 with explicit editorial policy disclosure 'We cannot accept a Lean publication that has multiple sorry's left in it'. Compare to acceptable pattern at Item 8 Tunnell CNP Zenodo deposit (10.5281/zenodo.19834824): 'Axiom-isolated Lean 4 formalization ... zero sorry beyond it'.
entries.implications: L2 milestone needs sub-granularity: L2.2 (PARTIAL with sorry's, suitable for ITP/CPP/AAR) vs L2.3 (PARTIAL zero-sorry beyond named axiom, JAR-submission-ready). Cascade required: l2_lean_pcf_pivot_direction_v1.md v1.1 → v1.2 bump.

entries.summary: Submission ID 261966792 attribution to Item 23 (Monatshefte T2B) is CLI provisional inference, not operator-attested
entries.evidence: Operator paste 2026-05-12 ~10:40 JST provided 7 submission updates; 4 were ID-tagged with item-content cues (Items 5/13/16/17/18 self-evident from venue/verdict text); 2 had unambiguous mapping (Item 11 by manuscript-ref pattern NON- = Nonlinearity); 261966792 was tagged only 'status: with Editor' with no item-content cue. CLI provisional inference: only in-flight Springer EM venue with previous ID=pending = Item 23 Monatshefte T2B (other Springer EM venue Item 20 Indagationes already has ID).
entries.implications: If 261966792 actually = some other submission (e.g. an unlisted item or mis-IDed earlier), Item 23 status remains pending-of-ID and 261966792 belongs to an unidentified item. Operator confirm or correct required before subsequent absorption cycles rely on this attribution.
